user.title: Open-Meteo Custom Settings
user.description: Please select the zone and forecast model you want to retrieve weather data for.

abort.already_configured: This zone and forecast model combination is already configured.

attribution.best_match: Weather forecast from Open-Meteo (Best Match Auto-Selection)
attribution.dwd_icon_eu: Weather forecast from Deutscher Wetterdienst, delivered by Open-Meteo (ICON Europe)
attribution.dwd_icon: Weather forecast from Deutscher Wetterdienst, delivered by Open-Meteo (ICON Global)
attribution.ecmwf_ifs: Weather forecast from European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts, delivered by Open-Meteo (ECMWF)
attribution.gfs_global: Weather forecast from National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, delivered by Open-Meteo (GFS)
attribution.meteofrance_seamless: Weather forecast from Météo-France, delivered by Open-Meteo (Seamless)
attribution.gem_seamless: Weather forecast from Environment and Climate Change Canada, delivered by Open-Meteo (GEM)
attribution.ukmo_seamless: Weather forecast from UK Met Office, delivered by Open-Meteo (Seamless)
attribution.fallback: Weather forecast from {model}, delivered by Open-Meteo
